title: Markbee's Star
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{Star |image= |name=Markbee's Star |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square L-5 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] |system=[[Markbee's Star system/Legends|Markbee's Star system]] |coordinates=L-5 |xyz= |routes=[[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]] |distance= |orbits=[[Zeffliffl]]''[[The Crystal Star]]'' |stations= |asteroids= |other= |class= |diameter= }} {{Quote|Where do those folks over there come from? And is it a group, or one person?''"
"''Why, a group, of course, sir. They are from the fourth world of Markbee's Star, specifically, from—if I am not mistaken—Zeffliffl.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|}} '''Markbee's Star''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zeffliffl]], the fourth planet of the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. {{Star-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== Markbee's Star was created by [[Vonda N. McIntyre]] for her novel ''[[The Crystal Star]]''. She named the star after her friend Mark Bourne, who helped her with some astronomy relating to the novel.{{WebCite|url=http://blog.bookviewcafe.com/2009/04/05/my-year-in-la-the-sci-fi-channel-interview-or-vonda-encounters-makeup|text=My Year in LA: The Sci Fi Channel Interview, or, Vonda Encounters Makeup|author=[[Vonda N. McIntyre]]|date=2009-04-05|archivedate=20090410131654}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}} {{ID|Markbee's star}} *''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{CSWECite|III||Zeffliffl}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Markbee's Star}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Atrivis sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Relgim Run]] [[Category:Stars in the New Territories]] [[Category:Stars in the Outer Rim Territories]]
